# TPA4Fabric
A simple TPA mod for Fabric.

# Commands
- tpa {to}
- tpaback
- tpaaccept [from]
- tpadeny [from]
- ~~tpacancel [to]~~
- tpaallow [true|false]

> { } is required and [ ] is optional (or in specific cases)

# To-do list 
- `/tpahere`
- `/tpacancel`
- `/tpaconfig` or runtime configs.
- Formatted messages.

# Known Issues
| Issue | Fixed | Workaround |
|:-----:|:-----:|:----------:|
| Teleporting breaks when the target player has died once (this goes on forever btw) | ☑ (as of v0.0.4+release.1) | Rejoining (the target player) |
| Teleporting into an another player whose current dimension is not the same as yours puts you in a "void" world | ☑ (as of v0.0.4+release.1) | Try removing C2ME |
| Pets get left behind after teleporting | ☑ (as of v0.0.4+release.1) | None |
